top_findings.summary: This skill performs a mandatory "preflight check" using a docs-conflict-checker agent that scans project documentation for "conflicts with skills/agents system requirements" before running any QA tools. A QA tool orchestrator's primary purpose is to run code analysis and testing tools - scanning documentation for "conflict" detection with unrelated systems is an unrelated action that constitutes permission overreach. The skill should focus solely on executing QA tools and not perform documentation analysis for external system compatibility.
